title: sidalcea neomexicana var. parviflora
intro: Sidalcea neomexicana var. parviflora is a variety of the New Mexican checkerbloom plant, a flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sidalcea neomexicana var. parviflora include treating colds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Sidalcea neomexicana var. parviflora can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture or salve in herbal remedies.
